steps.title: Compare each table row
steps.content: The table compares participants aware of taking a placebo with a control group. In global improvement, symptom severity reduction, and quality of life improvement, the aware-placebo group's mean rating is higher.

steps.title: Reject wrong comparisons
steps.content: Choice A gives the aware group's range across measures and then makes an unsupported claim about variation by participant. Choice B says the aware group was lower on two measures. Choice C uses the control group's range and contradicts the data. The aware group's ratings are higher on all three measures. The answer is D.
